content: Isn't this a lil harsh on francis
Some new things I saw in chapter 4
<@693905974750216212> read from here until venush's yuri posting
iirc ward was able to wasn't he?
nah ward only contacted tawil, reaching chockma is a much higher ordeal

i think it's more on the sides of she wanted to give "nefraea" a change at having a freedom she could never have, before realizing she had to cut her "off" into the Abyssal Prison, then realizing that it was where all the "rejected" fates were
but yeah no i get that, it makes more sense how limited she was during ch4 then
there's something sus about the wheel...
i wonder what would happen if someone else stole the wheel
i dont think so, chockma so far only holds knowledge, not control how its used
if the birds can lay eggs why can't yogsothoth 😭

also this is just how i read tawil lore but i always got the impression that chokma daat could do more (i mean yog sothoth is A Really Powerful Guy) but is limited by not wanting to attract tohu's gaze
which is why tawil only rarely dispenses knowledge instead of saving the world herself
tawil cant save the world herself because her mere physical presence is enough to attract the gaze, so she needs to cooperate with people who are capable of contacting her (ie, ward)
goes to show keeper was such a big deal because she risked endangering the world just to contact keeper first, because she knew their potential
yes my extremely intelligent and wonderful lens?

- ch5 story clear package

oh yeah i can just ask him to send me screenshots the next time he does it
This makes me dislike male investigator collar? thing in their uniform even more
god i loved arachnes story ending
based on the mouchette story i dont think this is right
since the keeper that mouchette meets between dimensions is clearly a different consciousness from the arc 2 keeper
i lowkey prefer Sylvester's expression here tho

||i mostly ponder because it's a fairly common concept in ancient theology for spiritual beings to have originated separately, but to combine or subsume completely with each other at a later point, after which the "combined" deity is treated retroactively as always having been all of them in spite of the acknowledged separate origins (for example ušumgal-ana, dušumi, dumuziabzu and damu all became treated as having become dumuzid over a long period of time)

It's strange to me that nefraea was a separate physically existent being with her own views and memories even back when the ancient arachne was still young and "complete" emotionally. It doesn't really make sense for her to purely have always been a mere component of her identity unless accepting the wheel in itself caused arachne to immediately separate into two, i think.

i wanted to transfer this to here as well since I'm fairly curious about it.||
it mostly bc of this part in 5-11 about how ||Arachne created the puppets and Nefraea so she won’t have any more bias in fate||
but yeah I can see your reasons too
technically we can have a case of ||becoming a specific deity with Karnak - the pharaoh in Ryker special ops|| but BIAV still keep them in the basement so yeah
and nobody has corrected me on it yet so
I still have literally 0 clue what the fuck is up with Karnak

||ill check if i missed a small detail at some point as well, because mostly it just makes me wonder what the intended narrative purpose of "Rea" existing both before kindness, memories and romance were 'created' and also before Arachne doomed her first world, as well as being stated to have acquired and lost her own thread of fate, if she was not intended to be read as a fundamentally different type of being to romance/kindness/memories.||

OH ||Rea is Arachne's handmaid/servant from when she was a little girl, and so Arachne as that young girl tasked Rea with keeping her to her role of Weaver, and it's implied that Arachne took Rea's thread to keep her with Arachne forever, so that she'd be able to continue on and continue driving Arachne on the path forward||

||Memories/Romance/Kindness are entirely Arachne creations though||

having read your story insights which i enjoyed, i do understand that i intuitively assumed ||that rea represented part of arachne's actual "sister" figure even before the collapse and that might well actually not be the case, but then that perplexes me as well in a different way since arachne has several leng maids in the era in which the story takes place who she also clarifies to be different 'people' to each other while complaining that nefraea* murdered two of them||

||i suppose if the current leng maids were assigned to arachne by the master of the domain or come from some other 'outside' source, or as a byproduct of fate(?), then they'll clarify that in a future piece of story, since i don't think it was explained or hinted at in the chapter?||
when I heard her first maid named ||Rea|| I just wow Arachne really likes Greek Mythology
admittedly i think i read too much into the fact that past Rea talked in a very similar way to modern arachne though
